body: While testing https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/pull/4660 I realized these methods do not exist. As a consequence, any two IBGs with the same underlying grid return `true` when tested with `==`.
title: Create methods for equality of ImmersedBoundaryGrids

body: and while we are at it, also refactor `ZStar` to `ZStarCoordinate`
title: Move storage space to from `MutableVerticalDiscretization` to `ZStarCoordinate`
